No coordinates configured in the ioBroke: No coordinates configured in the ioBroker system settings!
Geocoding failed: instance must be runni: Geocoding failed: instance must be running
Click on the map or drag the marker to s: Click on the map or drag the marker to set the location.
Assign this feeding station’s own sensor: Assign this feeding station’s own sensors. Used for temperature blocking and dynamic feeding.
Enable a temperature source above to use: Enable a temperature source above to use it here.
No switches configured yet. Add one to c: No switches configured yet. Add one to create its own tab.
Name: Name
Controlled by dynamic feeding: the inter: Controlled by dynamic feeding: the interval is computed from temperature within the window below.
Adapts interval and duration to temperat: Adapts interval and duration to temperature; fixed times are replaced by an interval within the window.
Reminders need a configured Telegram ins: Reminders need a configured Telegram instance (see below).
Verify that the switch actually turns on: Verify that the switch actually turns on and off
Only works if the switch reports its rea: Only works if the switch reports its real state back (acknowledged / ack=true).
Staggered re-checks before a fault is re: Staggered re-checks before a fault is reported - useful for devices with delayed radio feedback (e.g. Homematic).
Select a switch object in the general se: Select a switch object in the general settings first.
Leave the instance empty to disable Tele: Leave the instance empty to disable Telegram for this switch.
Notify if feeding could not be performed: Notify if feeding could not be performed
The location is used to compute sunrise/: The location is used to compute sunrise/sunset for the per-switch astronomical feeding window. The sunrise/sunset offsets are configured per switch.
Use system settings (system.config) for: Use system settings (system.config) for all switches
One shared location for all switches: One shared location for all switches
Configure the location individually per: Configure the location individually per switch
Each switch defines its own location on: Each switch defines its own location on its tab.
The window follows sunrise/sunset (astro: The window follows sunrise/sunset (astronomical window enabled under Restrictions).
Restrict feeding to the astronomical day: Restrict feeding to the astronomical day window (sunrise/sunset + offsets)
Two water sensors only help in deep, unm: Two water sensors only help in deep, unmixed ponds (no pump running). The block always uses the coldest layer.
Up to 3 one-off periods in which feeding: Up to 3 one-off periods in which feeding is completely suspended (e.g. a quarantine after restocking). A Telegram message is sent at the start and end.
Master switch: while ON, ALL feeding for: Master switch: while ON, ALL feeding for this switch is suspended immediately and indefinitely, overriding the scheduled pauses and every feeding mode. Turn it OFF to resume feeding as configured. A Telegram message is sent when you toggle it.
